svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="Figma双MCP协作闭环" id="mcp2"> <mxGraphModel dx="-674" dy="-137" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1300" pageHeight="460" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="Figma 双 MCP 协作：官方生成图层 + figma-mcp-go 绑 Token，设计↔代码两头走通" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="1240" x="30" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="html" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="HTML 组件
(SVG + CSS 渐变 + capture.js)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="160" x="30" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="official" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eff6ff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontStyle=0;" value="官方 Figma MCP（云端）

generate_figma_design

(矢量/文字/渐变保留)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="160" x="470" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gomcp" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ecfdf5;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="figma-mcp-go（本地）

绑定设计 Token
create_variable / bind

73 个读写工具" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="180" x="680" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="back" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="get_design_context
读设计 + Token" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="150" x="910" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vue" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="Vue 代码
(结构 + Token 引用 + 交互)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="150" x="1110" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a1" edge="1" parent="1" source="html" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;endArrow=classic;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;" target="official" value="生成"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a2" edge="1" parent="1" source="official" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;endArrow=classic;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;" target="layer" value="转图层"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a3" edge="1" parent="1" source="layer" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#0f766e;endArrow=classic;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;" target="gomcp" value="精修/绑 Token"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a4" edge="1" parent="1" source="gomcp" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;endArrow=classic;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;" target="back" value="读取"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a5" edge="1" parent="1" source="back" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;endArrow=classic;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;" target="vue" value="还原"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="quota" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fef2f2;strokeColor=#ef4444;fontColor=#991b1b;fontSize=11;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="⚠️ 配额坑：官方读工具免费版每月仅 6 次，写工具（Code to Canvas）不限
→ 读取集中批处理，能写就别读，Token 对齐靠脚本" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="620" x="240" y="330" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=2;" value="一个外部能力可能要拆成几个 MCP server 组合用——理解工具的能力边界，比理解协议本身更关键。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="1240" x="30" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div: 一个外部能力可能要拆成几个 MCP server 组合用——理解工具的能力边界，比理解协议本身更关键。
